title: Multimedia Development for the Catalan Encyclopedia
description: Production of the 'Routes of Catalonia' collection on 28 CD-ROMs, co-published by El Periódico, Enciclopèdia Catalana, and TV3, and the Summer Interactive Booklets.
body:
**Enciclopèdia Catalana** was one of the leading publishers of educational and cultural multimedia products in Catalan. The collaboration focused on two landmark projects in late-90s digital production.

## Routes of Catalonia: 28 CD-ROMs

The *Routes of Catalonia* collection was an ambitious publishing project: 28 CD-ROMs co-published by **El Periódico**, **Enciclopèdia Catalana**, and **TV3**, which combined video, audio, photographs, and interactive content to explore the Catalan territory.

The multimedia development required managing large volumes of audiovisual assets and programming the interactions with **Macromedia Director** and **Lingo**, ensuring that the titles ran correctly on the home computers of the time.

## Summer Interactive Notebooks

I also participated in the development of the [Interactive Summer Workbooks](https://www.grec.net/home/escolar/PRIMARIA/qestiucd8.htm), interactive educational tools for elementary school students. A project that combined pedagogy, design, and programming.

## Technologies

-   Macromedia Director
-   Lingo
-   Photoshop
-   Freehand
